name: DataForSEO

composio_registry_match.name: Dataforseo
composio_registry_match.description: SEO data and analytics platform providing SERP data, backlinks, keywords, and competitive intelligence

description: Comprehensive SEO and search engine data API providing SERP, keyword analysis, and on-page data through REST endpoints.
notes: The API is well-documented with 312 endpoints reported by integration platforms; authentication is handled via API Key (Login/Password credentials used for API access).
